# UpdateRoleSetRequestBody


## Fields

| Field                                                                                                                                                                                          | Type                                                                                                                                                                                           | Required                                                                                                                                                                                       | Description                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `name`                                                                                                                                                                                         | *?string*                                                                                                                                                                                      | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | The new name for the role set                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `key`                                                                                                                                                                                          | *?string*                                                                                                                                                                                      | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | A unique key for the role set. Must start with 'role_set:' and contain only lowercase alphanumeric characters and underscores.                                                                 |
| `description`                                                                                                                                                                                  | *?string*                                                                                                                                                                                      | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | Optional description for the role set                                                                                                                                                          |
| `type`                                                                                                                                                                                         | [?Operations\UpdateRoleSetType](../../Models/Operations/UpdateRoleSetType.md)                                                                                                                  | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | Set to "initial" to make this the default role set for new organizations.<br/>Only one role set can be "initial" per instance; setting this will change any existing initial role set to "custom". |
| `defaultRoleKey`                                                                                                                                                                               | *?string*                                                                                                                                                                                      | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | The key of the role to use as the default role for new organization members.<br/>Must be an existing role in the role set.                                                                     |
| `creatorRoleKey`                                                                                                                                                                               | *?string*                                                                                                                                                                                      | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                                                                                                                             | The key of the role to assign to organization creators.<br/>Must be an existing role in the role set.                                                                                          |
